title: Netru Naan Lyrics Jeeva Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Netru Naan
Singer(s): Sathya Prakash
Music: D.Imman
Movie: Jeeva (2014)

Netru naan paarthadhum
unnaithaana sol.
Indru naan kaanbadhum
unnaithaana sol.

Aadai maara jaadai maara
koondhal paadham yaavum maara
kangalo un kangalo maaravillai.
kangalo en kangalo yemaravillai
poi kooravillai.

Netru naan paarthadhum
unnaithaana sol.
Indru naan kaanbadhum
unnaithaana sol.

Pallikooda vaasam meendum
thalli pona nesam meendum
dhooraththil
un vaasnai ennai thaakkudhadi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Netru Naan?

The song Netru Naan expresses feelings of love and nostalgia, reflecting on past moments shared with a loved one.

What is the context of this song in the movie Jeeva?

In Jeeva, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional journey and connection with their love interest.

Who is the singer of Netru Naan?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash, known for his melodious voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for Netru Naan?

The music for Netru Naan was composed by D Imman, a renowned music director in the Tamil film industry.

When was Netru Naan released?

Netru Naan was released on September 11, 2014, as part of the Jeeva soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Netru Naan, the protagonist reflects on cherished memories with their beloved, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing. The soothing melody, paired with Sathya Prakash's heartfelt vocals, creates an emotional atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song beautifully captures the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As part of the movie Jeeva, it enhances the narrative by highlighting the emotional depth of the characters' relationship.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Netru Naan from the Jeeva movie is a heartfelt melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Sathya Prakash's soulful voice and D Imman's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly blends emotion and melody, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Yesterday, I saw you, that's what I say. Today, I see you, that's what I say.
The way you change, the way you change, your beautiful hair never changes, your eyes never change. My eyes never change, they don't lie.
Yesterday, I saw you, that's what I say. Today, I see you, that's what I say.
The place where I used to live has been pushed away, the love has gone far away, your fragrance pulls me back.
Your gaze, your gaze, it draws me in, my heart listens.
